faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Richmond, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Richmond typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees for all Richmond residents.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Richmond homes?
faqs.answer: Heat treatments can eliminate bed bugs in 6-8 hours in a single visit, while chemical treatments typically require 2-3 visits spaced two weeks apart. Our technicians will assess your Richmond property and recommend the most effective approach for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Richmond, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency bed bug services throughout Richmond and all of Staten Island. We understand how stressful bed bug infestations are and prioritize rapid response to prevent the problem from worsening.

faqs.question: Are your bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Richmond?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow all NYC regulations for safe bed bug treatment. Heat treatments are completely chemical-free, and our chemical applications are safe for children and pets once dried, typically within 2-4 hours.
